private_override_requirements: Create a private override outside git before remote execution.
Resolve <a100_project_root> to the approved private A100 project directory.
Resolve adapter_path to the existing merged slot value 7B adapter.
Run prediction only; do not launch SFT, DPO, GRPO, or adapter continuation training.
Require prediction metadata to show the hardened canonical prompt flags before interpreting results.
Keep raw logs, checkpoints, adapters, caches, host details, SSH details, tokens, and private corpus rows out of committed artifacts.
